lede: A look at August 17 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Nastasja Schunk and Tyrus Thomas, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 17 August 2019 Kabul bombing
events.desc: A bomb explodes at a wedding in Kabul killing 63 people and leaving 182 injured.

events.title: Michael Phelps
events.desc: American swimmer Michael Phelps becomes the first person to win eight gold medals at one Olympic Games.

events.title: Korean War
events.desc: Korean War: Forty-two American prisoners of war were massacred by the Korean People's Army on a hill above Waegwan, South Korea.

events.title: Animal Farm
events.desc: The novella Animal Farm by George Orwell is first published.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: U.S. Marines raid the Japanese-held Pacific island of Makin.

events.title: 1915 Galveston hurricane
events.desc: A Category 4 hurricane hits Galveston, Texas with winds at 135 miles per hour (217 km/h).

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: Battle of Stallupönen: The German army of General Hermann von François defeats the Russian force commanded by Paul von Rennenkampf near modern-day Nesterov, Russia.

events.title: Pike Place Market
events.desc: Pike Place Market, one of the oldest continuously operated public farmers' markets in the U.S. and a popular tourist attraction, opens in Seattle, Washington.

events.title: 1668 North Anatolia earthquake
events.desc: The magnitude 8.0 North Anatolia earthquake causes 8,000 deaths in northern Anatolia, Ottoman Empire.

events.title: Byzantine–Bulgarian wars
events.desc: Byzantine–Bulgarian wars: Battle of the Gates of Trajan: The Bulgarians under the Comitopuli Samuel and Aron defeat the Byzantine forces at the Gate of Trajan, with Byzantine Emperor Basil II barely escaping.

births.name: Sean Penn
births.line: American actor, director, and political activist

births.name: Percy Sherwell
births.line: South African cricketer and tennis player (died 1948)

deaths.text: Conrad Aiken, American novelist, short story writer, critic, and poet

observances.text: Christian feast day: Saint Beatrice of Silva
Christian feast day: Saint Clare of Montefalco
Christian feast day: Saint Hyacinth of Poland
Christian feast day: Saint Mammes of Caesarea
Christian feast day: Samuel Johnson, Timothy Cutler, and Thomas Bradbury Chandler (Episcopal Church)
